race.comment: SPACE ACADEMY (8) stepped up in trip last time out and couldn't see out the extra journey, finishing 8.8L off the winner. His performances prior over the mile previously were much better and that sees him as an attractive commodity in this field. Has enough speed to offset the barrier and can return to winning ways. ROMMEL'S JEUNEY (9) led and won over 1500m at York last time out when the race favourite, holding on in a photo finish. He too should be rolling across from out wide and if he can dictate the tempo, he'll be tough to reel in. REAL SENOR (11) turned in a better performance last start behind ROMMEL'S JEUNEY and draws to get all the favours today. Can turn the tables without surprising. SNIP OF GOSSIP (5) got a long way back when 6 lengths from the winner in ninth over 1500m at York last start. Yet to miss the placings in two starts over this course and distance. Has his share of ability. ALABRAE (6) is next best in this easier assignment.
